title: Notifications -  Device updating
scenario: DFU notification "Device software is updating..." appears and tapping it opens the app to the Software Update screen with progress bar
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app and ensure a Poly Bluetooth audio device is connected.
2. Navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Device Settings.
3. Initiate a device firmware update (DFU) from the Software Update section.
4. Observe the notification area for the message "Device software is updating...".
5. Press the Home button to send the app to the background.
6. Tap the "Device software is updating..." notification.
7. Observe the screen that the app opens to.
expected: 1. A notification "Device software is updating..." appears when the DFU begins.\n2. Tapping the notification while the app is in the background brings the app to the foreground and opens the Software Update screen showing the DFU progress bar.
